second, a good part of a thought comes from a feeling or a quick guess. third, a good piece of a thought fits well with other thoughts that already work. a good act can also happen in many different ways. One way is to follow a set of ways to live, like being kind or being mean. These ways are inside the heart of the person. so, we cannot just look at the act by itself. We cannot just looks at the act alone. We have to look at the whole story, from the start to the end, until we see the the end too. If we want to know if an act was right, we must see where it goes. We see who it was looking out the window at the time. We look to see what happened in the real world.
